subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is a handmaiden from among Thy submissive and humble maidservants, who supplicates and implores fervently unto Thy Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه امة من امائک الخاضعه الخاشعه المبتهله المتضرعه الی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness
